Class SimulationLogger

java.lang.Object
simcli.engine.SimulationLogger
public class SimulationLogger extends Object
A central logger that domain objects can publish messages to.

Instead of printing directly to stdout, commands and managers call log(String) to buffer messages. The buffer is flushed by flushAndPrint() at controlled points in the game loop, ensuring that all accumulated messages appear in the correct order relative to the HUD and prompts.

This class also supports an optional "animation" Sim — set via logAnimation(Sim) — which triggers a visual action animation when the buffer is flushed.

Converted from static utility to instance class so that state is scoped per game session, making it testable and eliminating the need for a reset() call between sessions.

  • Constructor Details

    • SimulationLogger

      public SimulationLogger()

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static SimulationLogger getInstance()
      Returns the global logger instance for the current game session.

      If no instance has been explicitly set (e.g. in unit tests), a lazy-initialized default instance is created and registered. This prevents NullPointerExceptions in test scenarios where the full engine is not running.

      Returns:
      the active SimulationLogger, never null.

    • setInstance

      public static void setInstance(SimulationLogger logger)
      Sets the global logger instance. Called once by GameEngine when a new game session starts.
      Parameters:
      logger - the logger to use globally.

    • log

      public void log(String message)
      Buffers a plain message for later display.
      Parameters:
      message - the text to log.

    • logWarning

      public void logWarning(String message)
      Buffers a warning message (prefixed with [WARNING]).
      Parameters:
      message - the warning text to log.

    • logAnimation

      public void logAnimation(Sim player)
      Registers a Sim for an action animation on the next flush.
      Parameters:
      player - the Sim whose action should be animated.

    • prompt

      public void prompt(String message)
      Flushes all buffered messages, then prints a prompt without a trailing newline.
      Parameters:
      message - the prompt text (e.g. "Press ENTER...").

    • flushAndPrint

      public void flushAndPrint()
      Flushes all buffered log messages to stdout and triggers any pending action animation. Clears the buffer afterwards.

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Clears all buffered logs without printing them. Must be called when transitioning between game sessions.
